memories.emptyForDay: No memories for this day yet.

memories.pastYearsTitle: On This Day in Past Years

memories.friendsLoadErrorWithRetry: Couldn't load friends' memories. Try again.

generating.label: Crafting your vibe...
generating.takePhotoPrompt: Take a photo to get your vibe

aiTools.title: AI tools
aiTools.rewriteGuidance: Make it one sentence, under 180 characters, and safe to share.
aiTools.rewriteReady: This rewrite is ready to use.
aiTools.loadingExplain: Reading the feeling behind your quote…
aiTools.loadingFuture: Writing the next quote you may need…
aiTools.futureReviewGuidance: Edit if you want, then apply it as your quote.
aiTools.editQuoteHint: Tap the quote to edit it.
aiTools.editQuoteGuidance: Keep it to one sentence, under 180 characters, and safe to use.

streak.modalEmptyMessage: Start your streak by capturing a quote today.
streak.modalFirstDayMessage: First day! Come back tomorrow to keep it going.
streak.modalActiveMessage_one: {{count}} day in a row — keep it up!
streak.modalActiveMessage_other: {{count}} days in a row — keep it up!

subscription.aiLimitReachedTitle: You reached today's free AI limit.
subscription.aiLimitReachedBody: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited quote generations.
subscription.personaLockedBody: Upgrade to unlock advanced persona controls.
subscription.paywallHeroTitle: Create better quote cards without limits
subscription.paywallHeroSubtitle: Unlimited quotes, exports, and premium styles.
subscription.paywallBullet1: Generate as many AI quotes as you want — no daily cap.
subscription.paywallBullet2: Export and share quote cards without limits.
subscription.paywallBullet3: Unlock every theme and remove the watermark.
subscription.aiLimitPaywallBody: You've used today's free generations. Pro unlocks unlimited AI quotes so you never hit a wall.
subscription.exportLimitPaywallBody: You've reached today's export limit. Pro lets you export and share as many cards as you want.
subscription.premiumThemePaywallBody: Pro opens every premium layout and style so your cards always look polished.
subscription.personaPaywallBody: Pro unlocks full persona controls so the AI matches your voice.
subscription.noPlansAvailable: We couldn't load subscription plans. Check your connection and try again, or open the App Store / Play Store and try later.
subscription.alreadyProToast: Pro is already active on this account.
subscription.purchaseSuccessToast: Subscription active — you're on Pro now.
subscription.purchaseFailedToast: We couldn't complete the purchase. Please try again.
subscription.purchaseVerifyLater: Purchase received. If Pro doesn't unlock in a minute, tap Restore purchases.
subscription.restoreSuccessToast: Pro restored — your subscription is active.
subscription.restoreFailedToast: We couldn't restore purchases. Please try again.
subscription.restoreNoActiveToast: No active subscription found for this account.
subscription.footerReassurance: Payments are processed by Apple or Google. You can cancel anytime in Settings.
subscription.statusLoadingPlansBody: We're fetching live prices and plans from Apple or Google. This usually takes a few seconds.
subscription.statusPurchasingBody: Stay on this screen. You may be asked to confirm with Face ID, Touch ID, or your store password.
subscription.statusRestoringBody: We're checking your account for an active subscription. This may take a moment.
subscription.ctaHelperIos: You'll confirm with Face ID, Touch ID, or your Apple ID.
subscription.ctaHelperAndroid: You'll confirm with your Google Play account on the next screen.

profile.languageCombinedDescription: Change the app and your quotes together.
profile.languageUiDescription: Choose what the app interface speaks.
profile.languageQuoteDescription: Choose the language used for your generated quotes.
profile.reminderDescription: One notification per day at the time you pick.
profile.reminderNotificationToast: Turn on notifications in system settings to get your daily reminder.
profile.reminderNotifBody: Open Inkly to see today's personalized quote.
profile.nameTooLong: Name must be 40 characters or less.
profile.photoAccessRequired: Please allow photo access to update your avatar.
profile.guestSignInHint: Sign in to save your profile and invite friends.

login.subtitle: Continue to verify your account and unlock your daily vibe.

features.verifiedDesc: We only use your account to sync vibes across devices.
features.personaDesc: Today's quote is tuned to traits and goals you set later.
features.memoriesDesc: Reinstall, switch phones — your saved vibes follow.

errors.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.appleFailed: Apple sign-in failed. Please try again.

friends.title: Friends

friends.noFriendsPlaceholder: No friends yet. Share your invite link so friends can add you.

welcome.headline: Your daily vibe, distilled.
welcome.subheadline: One quote a day, tuned to who you are and what today asks of you.
welcome.previewQuote: "A small, true thing— carried gently— is enough."

tone.title: Tell us your tone
tone.subtitle: A few taps on what calms, fires, or steadies you. No long quiz, no signup tax.

compose.title: Inkly composes for you
compose.subtitle: Each morning, one quote — written from your traits, today's mood, and the season.
compose.previewQuote: "Today bends toward the calm you carry."

save.title: Save what lands
save.subtitle: Tap a line that hits. It joins a private collection you can revisit anytime.

persona.title: Who are you, lately?
persona.subtitle: Pick any that feel close. You can change these whenever a season turns.

goals.title: What are you reaching for?
goals.subtitle: Quotes will lean toward what you choose — but never in a hurry.
goals.option_peace_desc: ease the noise; settle the chest
goals.option_reconnect_desc: with people, places, or my own pace

goal.title: What are you here for?
goal.subtitle: We'll tune your experience around this.
goal.option_sharing: Beautiful content to save and share
goal.option_different: Something different from generic quote apps

style.title: What style feels like you?
style.subtitle: This shapes how your quotes look.

traits.title: Now pick your vibe.
traits.subtitle: Your quotes are written for someone exactly like you. Pick 1–5.

notification.title: When should today's vibe arrive?
notification.subtitle: One quiet ping, once a day. Change it anytime.
notification.slot_morning_desc: Set the tone with your coffee.
notification.previewBody: "A small, true thing— carried gently— is enough."
notification.errorPermission: Notifications blocked. You can enable them in Settings anytime.

camera.title: Bring your world into Inkly
camera.subtitle: Take a photo and we'll write a quote around it — just for you.
camera.feature1: AI quotes inspired by your surroundings
camera.feature2: Save your photo moments to memories
camera.errorPermission: Camera blocked. Enable it in Settings anytime.

proTeaser.subtitle: Free plan gets you started. Upgrade anytime to unlock everything.
proTeaser.feature_unlimitedAI_subtitle: Generate as many quotes as you want, every day.
proTeaser.feature_rewrite_subtitle: Rewrite any quote in calm, funny, or savage tones.
proTeaser.feature_future_subtitle: See where your mindset could take you tomorrow.
proTeaser.feature_watermark_subtitle: Share your moments without the {{brandMark}} badge.
